text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 81 

HCBS_HIV_AIDS_CC_IND 

LABEL: HCBS HIV or AIDS State-Reported Chronic Condition Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary had the Home and Community Based Services (HCBS) Non-
health home Chronic Condition “HIV/AIDS”; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HCBS_HIV_AIDS_CC_IND 

LONG NAME: HCBS_HIV_AIDS_CC_IND
